steps.title: Count favorable and total outcomes
steps.content: The favorable outcomes are the red pens: $13$. The total number of pens is $$13+37=50$$

steps.title: Use probability equals favorable over total
steps.content: $$P(\text{red})=\frac{13}{50}$$ To convert to a decimal, divide: $$13\div 50=0.26$$

steps.title: Confirm the grid-in answer
steps.content: The problem asks for a decimal or fraction, not a percent. Enter .26, 0.26, or 13/50.
